content.claim: Primary school enrollment in Hungary is declining nationally by approximately 4% per annum, with accelerated decline in rural areas due to youth migration to cities for employment
content.context: Fresh live research through the Equity and social mobility lens
limitations: Figure cited is from an older source and should be treated as indicative of long-term trend rather than current precise rate
Enrollment decline is reported nationally but causal attribution to employment migration is inferred rather than directly measured
Regional variation in decline rates not fully quantified in available sources
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
